privileged-debugger.reason: Required only for explicit user-triggered native input fallback on the approved active tab.

clipboard-read.reason: Supports an opt-in clipboard watch workflow controlled from the extension interface.

unlimited-storage.reason: Stores user-created response archives and code vault data locally without silent eviction.

broad-http-host.reason: The master universal automation mode supports user-selected HTTP sites and a localhost bridge.

broad-https-host.reason: The master universal automation mode supports user-selected AI and productivity websites.

file-host-access.reason: File page support is an explicit universal-sender feature and still requires browser file access approval.

broad-http-content-script.reason: Universal automation is intentionally available on user-opened HTTP pages in the master extension.

broad-https-content-script.reason: Universal automation is intentionally available on user-opened HTTPS pages in the master extension.

file-content-script.reason: Universal automation can run on user-approved local file pages when Chrome file access is enabled.

clipboard-read.reason: An explicit clipboard watch mode reads text only after the user enables that workflow.

broad-https-host.reason: Generated image assets may be served from changing HTTPS CDN origins before user-requested download.

clipboard-read.reason: User-triggered caption and draft import can read clipboard text into the visible assistant panel.

broad-http-host.reason: This helper is explicitly the universal sender for user-selected HTTP websites.

broad-https-host.reason: This helper is explicitly the universal sender for user-selected HTTPS websites.

file-host-access.reason: This helper supports local file pages after the user enables Chrome file URL access.

broad-http-content-script.reason: The universal sender must observe the user-selected composer on arbitrary HTTP pages.

broad-https-content-script.reason: The universal sender must observe the user-selected composer on arbitrary HTTPS pages.

file-content-script.reason: The universal sender supports user-approved local file pages as a documented feature.

broad-http-host.reason: The capture helper detects user-owned direct video URLs across arbitrary HTTP pages.

broad-https-host.reason: The capture helper detects user-owned direct video URLs across arbitrary HTTPS pages.

broad-http-content-script.reason: The visible helper panel detects direct user-owned video elements on HTTP pages.

broad-https-content-script.reason: The visible helper panel detects direct user-owned video elements on HTTPS pages.
